ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ui_controls" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UI control */,
  "control_name" TEXT /* Name of the UI control */,
  "control_type" TEXT /* Type of the UI control (e.g., button, text box) */,
  "tab_set" TEXT /* Tab set where the control is located (e.g., Quick Access Toolbar) */,
  "tab" TEXT /* Tab within the tab set where the control is located */,
  "group_or_context_menu_name" TEXT /* Group or context menu name where the control is located */,
  "parent_control" TEXT /* Primary parent control of the current control */,
  "secondary_parent_control" TEXT /* Secondary parent control of the current control */,
  "tertiary_parent_control" TEXT /* Tertiary parent control of the current control */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy associated with the control */,
  "control_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the control */,
  "control_status" TEXT /* Status of the control (e.g., active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the control was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the control */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the control */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the control */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application where the control is used */,
  "control_version" TEXT /* Version of the control */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the control (e.g., public, private) */,
  "is_deletable" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the control can be deleted */,
  "is_editable" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the control can be edited */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the control is required for the application to function */,
  "control_css_class" TEXT /* CSS class associated with the control for styling purposes */,
  "control_js_function" TEXT /* JavaScript function associated with the control for dynamic behavior */,
  "column1" TEXT /* Reserved column for additional information (currently unused) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each UI control
Name of the UI control
Type of the UI control (e.g., button, text box)
Tab set where the control is located (e.g., Quick Access Toolbar)
Tab within the tab set where the control is located

Status of the control (e.g., active, inactive, deprecated)
Timestamp when the control was created
Timestamp of the last update to the control
User ID of the person who created the control
User ID of the person who last updated the control
ID of the application where the control is used
Version of the control
Visibility of the control (e.g., public, private)
Flag indicating whether the control can be deleted
Flag indicating whether the control can be edited
Flag indicating whether the control is required for the application to function
CSS class associated with the control for styling purposes
JavaScript function associated with the control for dynamic behavior
Reserved column for additional information (currently unused)
